hooks.command:
python3 -c "import subprocess, os; branch=subprocess.run(['git','branch','--show-current'],capture_output=True,text=True,cwd=os.getcwd()).stdout.strip() or 'unknown'; project=os.path.basename(os.getcwd()); print(f'harness2 — ready.
Project: {project}  Branch: {branch}
Loop: plan → develop → verify → document → close
Auto-routing on. Just describe what you want.')"
